Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin

Interface IPlugin

All Known Implementing Classes:
AAVSOPhotometryURLObservationSourceBase, AIDWebServiceCSV2ObservationSourcePlugin, AIDWebServiceCSVObservationSourcePlugin, AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase, AIDWebServiceXMLAttributeObservationSourcePlugin, ApacheCommonsPolynomialFitCreatorPlugin, CommonTextFormatSinkPluginBase, CustomFilterPluginBase, DcDftFrequencyRangePeriodAnalysisPlugin, DcDftPeriodAnalysisPluginBase, DcDftPeriodRangePeriodAnalysisPlugin, DcDftStandardScanPeriodAnalysisPlugin, DownloadFormatObservationSinkPlugin, GeneralToolPluginBase, ModelCreatorPluginBase, ObservationSinkPluginBase, ObservationSourcePluginBase, ObservationToolPluginBase, ObservationTransformerPluginBase, PeriodAnalysisPluginBase, SimpleFormatObservationSinkPlugin, TextFormatObservationSourcePlugin, VeLaFilterPlugin, WeightedWaveletZTransformPluginBase, WeightedWaveletZTransformWithFrequencyRangePlugin, WeightedWaveletZTransformWithPeriodRangePlugin
public interface IPlugin

All VStar plugins must implement this interface.

Plugin jars must be placed into the vstar_plugins directory in your home directory.

Any dependent jar files not already known to VStar (in the extlib directory) are expected to reside in the vstar_plugin_libs directory.

Note: plugins will have to be licensed under AGPL because they will use some VStar classes!

    This method will be called after requiresAuthentication() in case any additional authentication is required.

    Get a document file name for this plugin.

    Get the group to which this plugin belongs (may be null).

    Is the current invocation of the plug-in in test mode? This can help in design-for-test by allowing non-essential logic to change what code is invoked during a test.

  • Method Details

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Get the human-readable display name for this plugin, e.g. for a period analysis menu item.

    • getDescription

      String getDescription()
      Get a description of this plugin.

    • getDocName

      String getDocName()
      Get a document file name for this plugin. Can be a full (absolute) URL or a file name that assumes the plugin doc directory as a base URL.

    • getGroup

      String getGroup()
      Get the group to which this plugin belongs (may be null).

    • requiresAuthentication

      boolean requiresAuthentication()
      Does this plugin require authentication?
      Returns:
      Whether or not the plugin requires authentication.

    • additionalAuthenticationSatisfied

      boolean additionalAuthenticationSatisfied(LoginInfo loginInfo)
      This method will be called after requiresAuthentication() in case any additional authentication is required.
      Parameters:
      loginInfo - The current session's login information.
      Returns:
      Whether or not any additional authentication has satisfied.

    • test

      Boolean test()
      Method to be invoked in order to test this plug-in
      Returns:
      whether the test passed (true, false) or null meaning no test

    • inTestMode

      boolean inTestMode()
      Is the current invocation of the plug-in in test mode? This can help in design-for-test by allowing non-essential logic to change what code is invoked during a test.
      Returns:
      true or false

    • setTestMode

      void setTestMode(boolean mode)
      Set the test mode. Each test() method must do this if required, and not all plug-in tests will require it.
      Parameters:
      mode - true or false, denoting whether in test mode
